items.title: FTAI Aviation Earnings Due With New AI Stock Eyeing Buy Point
items.description: FTAI Aviation earnings loom with strong growth expected for the jet engine repair shop. But FTAI stock has surged in 2026 on a new AI shift.

items.title: 'Pentagon Takes First Step Toward Blacklisting Anthropic; Pentagon Reached Out To Boeing And Lockheed Martin On Wednesday To Ask About Their Exposure To Anthropic'- Axios
Revisiting 3 Stock Picks: S&P Global, Boeing, and MSG Sports. Where They Stand Now.
items.description: Revisiting former stock picks isn’t just about tallying past performance—old calls can reveal fresh investing opportunities.  This week I revisit S&P Global, a financial data play possibly on the rebound;  Boeing’s  tactical pullback; and entertainment play MSG Sports.  Last month, Barron’s Todd Chanko said to buy S&P Global, the ratings and financial data giant, when it was trading around $528.

items.title: China Plans Up to 120 Airbus Aircraft Order, Merz Says
items.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz says Chinese leadership intends to order as many as 120 additional Airbus commercial jets.

items.title: Federal Aviation Administration Issues Directive To Help Pilots Address Reports Of Boeing 737 In-Flight Events Involving Excessive Temperatures
